ham.subject: This Week's Highlights: New Features & Exclusive Offers
ham.body:
Hello Marketing Team,

Welcome to this week's marketing newsletter! We have exciting updates and offers you won't want to miss.

1️⃣ New Feature: Advanced Analytics Dashboard
   • Real‑time insights
   • Customizable widgets

2️⃣ Limited‑Time Discount: 30% off on all subscriptions until next Friday.

3️⃣ Upcoming Webinar: "Driving Growth with Content Marketing" – Register now!

Thank you for your continued support.

Best regards,
Sarah Lee
Marketing Manager

spam.subject: IT Helpdesk Ticket – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear IT Support,

I am experiencing a critical issue with my corporate account. It appears that my account has been flagged for suspicious activity, and I am unable to log in. Please investigate and restore access as soon as possible.

Attached is a screenshot of the error message.

To expedite the process, please verify my identity at the following link:

<URL>

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
Michael Thompson
Finance Director
